languages.text: "Искажения. Помехи. Энтропическая логика, вмешавшаяся в бытие сей обители, поразившая ее суть и множащая боль, которой несть конца и смысла". {n}Эоганн смахивает мехадендритом искры, бегущие по его лицу.{/n} "Этот технопатоген подобен худшей чуме из возможных".

"Distortions. Interference. Entropic logic has intervened in the existence of this sanctuary, striking at its very essence and multiplying a pain that is without end or purpose." {n}Eogunn brushes away the sparks racing down his face with his mechadendrite.{/n} "This tech-pathogen is akin to the worst possible plague."
languages.original_text: "Искажения. Помехи. Энтропическая логика, вмешавшаяся в бытие сей обители, поразившая ее суть и множащая боль, которой несть конца и смысла". {n}Эоганн смахивает мехадендритом искры, бегущие по его лицу.{/n} "Этот технопатоген подобен худшей чуме из возможных".

traits.locale_text: "Distortions. Interference. An entropic logic has intervened in the existence of this sanctuary, striking at its very essence and multiplying a pain that is without end or purpose." {n}Eogunn brushes away the sparks racing down his face with his mechadendrite.{/n} "This tech-pathogen is akin to the worst possible plague."

"Distortions. Interference. Entropic logic has intervened in the existence of this sanctuary, striking at its very essence and multiplying a pain that is without end or purpose." {n}Eogunn brushes away the sparks racing down his face with his mechadendrite.{/n} "This tech-pathogen is akin to the worst possible plague."

languages.text: «Distorsiones. Interferencia. La lógica entrópica ha intervenido en la existencia de este santuario, atacando su esencia y multiplicando un dolor infinito y carente de propósito». {n}Eogunn aparta las chispas que caen por su rostro con una mecadendrita.{/n} «Este tecnopatógeno es una plaga de la peor clase».
languages.original_text: "Distortions. Interference. Entropic logic has intervened in the existence of this sanctuary, striking at its very essence and multiplying a pain that is without end or purpose." {n}Eogunn brushes away the sparks racing down his face with his mechadendrite.{/n} "This tech-pathogen is akin to the worst possible plague."

traits.locale_text: «Distorsiones. Interferencia. La lógica entrópica ha intervenido en la existencia de este santuario, atacando su esencia y multiplicando un dolor infinito y carente de propósito». {n}Eogunn aparta las chispas que caen por su rostro con una mecadendrita.{/n} «Este tecnopatógeno es una plaga de la peor clase».

languages.text: “扭曲。干扰。熵的逻辑已侵入这处圣所的存在本身，攻击着它的本质，不断放大那种无边无际、毫无缘由的痛苦。”{n}伊奥贡用机械触须拂去脸上跳跃的电火花。{/n}“这种技术病原体堪比最可怕的瘟疫。”
languages.original_text: "Distortions. Interference. Entropic logic has intervened in the existence of this sanctuary, striking at its very essence and multiplying a pain that is without end or purpose." {n}Eogunn brushes away the sparks racing down his face with his mechadendrite.{/n} "This tech-pathogen is akin to the worst possible plague."

traits.locale_text: “扭曲。干扰。熵的逻辑已侵入这处圣所的存在本身，攻击着它的本质，不断放大那种无边无际、毫无缘由的痛苦。”{n}伊奥贡用机械触须拂去脸上跳跃的电火花。{/n}“这种技术病原体堪比最可怕的瘟疫。”

languages.text: "Störungen. Interferenz. Entropische Logik hat in die Existenz dieser Zuflucht eingegriffen, ihre Essenz getroffen und einen Schmerz ohne Ende und Zweck vervielfacht." {n}Eogunn wischt die auf sein Gesicht prasselnden Funken mit seinem Mechadendriten weg.{/n} "Dieses Tech-Pathogen gleicht der schlimmsten Pest."
languages.original_text: "Distortions. Interference. Entropic logic has intervened in the existence of this sanctuary, striking at its very essence and multiplying a pain that is without end or purpose." {n}Eogunn brushes away the sparks racing down his face with his mechadendrite.{/n} "This tech-pathogen is akin to the worst possible plague."

traits.locale_text: "Störungen. Interferenz. Entropische Logik hat in die Existenz dieser Zuflucht eingegriffen, ihre Essenz getroffen und einen Schmerz ohne Ende und Zweck vervielfacht." {n}Eogunn wischt die auf sein Gesicht prasselnden Funken mit seinem Mechadendriten weg.{/n} "Dieses Tech-Pathogen gleicht der schlimmsten Pest."

languages.text: « Distorsions, interférences... La logique entropique a interféré dans l'existence de ce sanctuaire, frappant son essence même et multipliant une douleur sans rime ni raison. » {n}Eogunn chasse les étincelles qui criblent son visage à l'aide de sa mécadendrite.{/n} « Ce technopathogène est un fléau comparable à la peste la plus virulente qui soit. »
languages.original_text: "Distortions. Interference. Entropic logic has intervened in the existence of this sanctuary, striking at its very essence and multiplying a pain that is without end or purpose." {n}Eogunn brushes away the sparks racing down his face with his mechadendrite.{/n} "This tech-pathogen is akin to the worst possible plague."

traits.locale_text: « Distorsions, interférences... La logique entropique a interféré dans l'existence de ce sanctuaire, frappant son essence même et multipliant une douleur sans rime ni raison. » {n}Eogunn chasse les étincelles qui criblent son visage à l'aide de sa mécadendrite.{/n} « Ce technopathogène est un fléau comparable à la peste la plus virulente qui soit. »

languages.text: "Bozulmalar. Parazitler. Entropik mantık; bu sığınağın varlığına müdahale etmiş, tam özüne vurmuş ve sonu ya da amacı olmayan bir acıyı katlayarak artırmış." {n}Eogunn, yüzünden aşağı akan kıvılcımları mekadentritiyle siliyor.{/n} "Bu tekno patojen, olabilecek en kötü vebaya benziyor."
languages.original_text: "Distortions. Interference. Entropic logic has intervened in the existence of this sanctuary, striking at its very essence and multiplying a pain that is without end or purpose." {n}Eogunn brushes away the sparks racing down his face with his mechadendrite.{/n} "This tech-pathogen is akin to the worst possible plague."

traits.locale_text: "Bozulmalar. Parazitler. Entropik mantık; bu sığınağın varlığına müdahale etmiş, tam özüne vurmuş ve sonu ya da amacı olmayan bir acıyı katlayarak artırmış." {n}Eogunn, yüzünden aşağı akan kıvılcımları mekadentritiyle siliyor.{/n} "Bu tekno patojen, olabilecek en kötü vebaya benziyor."

languages.text: 「歪み。干渉。エントロピーの論理がこの聖域の存在に介入し、その本質を攻撃し、終わりや目的のない苦しみを増幅させた。」{n}エオグンはメカデンドライトで顔に駆け巡る火花を払いのける。{/n}「このテクノ病原体は最悪の疫病に匹敵する。」
